description_en: Port-Louis may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 9 halal restaurants and 52 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Port-Louis, Mauritius, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Port-Louis: 19 halal restaurants listed, 52 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
